name: Boston Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight.
2. Drain the soaked beans and cover them with fresh water.
3. Bring the water to a boil, then simmer until the beans are tender.
4. Drain the cooked beans.
5. Pour half of the cooked beans into a bean pot.
6. Combine the remaining ingredients (salt, mustard, chopped onion, and salt pork) in a separate bowl.
7. Add this mixture to the pot with the remaining beans.
8. Cover everything with boiling water and place in an oven set to 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Bake for 8 hours, adding more water if necessary to keep the beans covered.
